strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems
Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Experience with high-throughput microservices (Dunnhumby) and fintech-adjacent work (RIDE Capital)
concerns: No executive (CTO/VP) leadership experience or evidence of scaling teams from 10 to 30+
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems in regulated, high-stakes commercial environments
Limited fintech-infrastructure depth in credit risk, working-capital, or trade decisioning systems

key_factors.factor: Lack of executive leadership track record
Insufficient production agentic-AI experience at required scale
Strong distributed-systems and polyglot engineering foundation

response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior/staff individual contributor with strong distributed-systems credentials and emerging exposure to agentic AI tooling, but the role demands an executive-level technologist with proven multi-agent production systems in regulated fintech and a history of scaling engineering organizations and leadership layers — areas where the resume does not show evidence at the required depth.
